hero.title: From Prompt to Picture: Create Images With Just Text

features.title: Effortless Text Input
features.description: Transform any idea, description, or keyword into a unique image. Converting text to image has never been easier.

features.title: Powerful AI Models
features.description: VidFab integrates the most powerful AI models, bringing your concepts to life instantly.

features.title: Multiple Aspect Ratios
features.description: Our rich aspect ratio options satisfy all your creative needs. No extra edits needed for final use.

features.title: Multi-Language Support
features.description: Enter your text prompts in any language and let our AI art generator craft a beautiful image for you.

features.title: One-Click Video Creation
features.description: Instantly turn your generated images into videos with a single click. Maximize every creation and save valuable time.

features.title: Process Multiple Tasks
features.description: Handle up to 4 image generation tasks at once, boosting your creative workflow and efficiency.

steps.title: Enter your prompt
steps.description: Type or paste a description of the image you want to create. Be as detailed or as simple as you like.

steps.title: Click to generate
steps.description: Our AI gets to work, interpreting your text to create a unique visual.

steps.title: Process with AI
steps.description: Your image is generated in seconds, ready for review.

steps.title: View and download
steps.description: Preview your new image online and download it for your projects.

items.question: How does VidFab AI generate images from text?
items.answer: VidFab uses powerful AI models that transform your written prompts into high-quality visuals. The system interprets the words you provide and generates a unique image that matches your description.

items.question: Is the VidFab AI Image Generator beginner-friendly?
items.answer: Yes! Our tool is designed with simplicity in mind. No artistic or technical skills are needed. If you can describe it, you can create it.

items.question: What languages are supported for text input?
items.answer: You can use a wide variety of languages for your text prompts, making it easy for creators around the world to generate art.

items.question: Do I need to download any software?
items.answer: No. VidFab is a fully browser-based tool. You can start creating images right away without any installation.

items.question: Can I use the generated images for commercial purposes?
items.answer: Absolutely. The images you create with VidFab are yours to use for marketing, social media, commercial products, and more.

items.question: Can I use the VidFab AI Image Generator for free?
items.answer: Yes. VidFab will provide 50 credits, allowing you to try generating images and videos initially.

communityCta.title: Create Images With Text Effortlessly
communityCta.description: VidFab makes it simple to generate captivating images from your words. Stop struggling with complex design software — our AI image generator does all the creative work for you.
communityCta.ctaText: Generate Your First Image for Free
